title: Sealapack BLACK TIE HANDLE BAGS, 70L SUPER SIZE, TOUGH, DURABLE PACK OF 10, SAP047
features: SUPER SIZE 70L: Sealapack Black Refuse Sacks hold a huge amount of rubbish. The 70L capacity is suitable for larger households, busy kitchens, offices and catering units. Easily clean up after a party, BBQ or picnic
NEATLY TIED UP: Sealapack Bags are perfect to get your refuse all tied-up neatly for easy disposal, tough durable material. Use for household waste, clearing up after a party, BBQ or catering event
KEEP IT CLEAN: Households with high waste disposal often find regular sacks easily split, spreading the contents, germs and bacteria. Each bag holds 70L of household rubbish
TOUGH: Sealapack Black Bags are specially formulated to hold the contents without splitting, allowing safe disposal of a large amount of rubbish
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL OF 10 SACKS
